ctxMarket: Attention is on Solana’s sharp 30% drop in futures open interest and price weakness, with speculation about further declines. Despite this, Solana’s on-chain activity and application revenue remain at record highs.
ctxTalking:
• TrapDoor package attack targeting Solana, Sui, and Aptos wallet data and developer credentials
• Solana futures open interest dropping 30% and price nearing new lows
• Expansion of sports-related projects on Solana, including fantasy, prediction markets, and Chiliz Fan Tokens
ctxMatters: Security risks from the TrapDoor attack could impact developer trust and user safety across Solana and similar networks. The drop in open interest and price signals shifting market sentiment, but sustained high application revenue and activity highlight continued network usage. The launch of sports betting and fan tokens positions Solana for growth in the $400B+ sports industry.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Security threats targeting Solana wallets and developer tools; strong sports sector expansion; stable application revenue despite market drops.
Noise: Price speculation about SOL reaching $68 without clear supporting fundamentals.
ctxGlossary:
TrapDoor — A malicious package campaign stealing crypto wallets and developer credentials.
Open Interest — The total value of outstanding futures contracts in the market.

readMore.title: Solana, Sui and Aptos wallet data targeted in TrapDoor package attack
Solana open interest drops 30% as altcoins slump
Building for the $400B+ Sports Industry on Solana
